content: The Battle of Waterloo took place on June 18, 1815. It was a pivotal battle in which the French Emperor Napoleon Bonaparte was defeated by the Duke of Wellington and Prussian forces, effectively ending Napoleon's rule and marking the end of the Napoleonic Wars.
